Details: Photo gallery management with Telegram integration for storage
Albums can be created and organized
Photos can be uploaded or fetched from Telegram
Gallery displays correctly with lazy loading
Photos can be tagged and filtered
Comments can be added to photos
Build album CRUD with cover photos ordering and privacy settings. Support nested albums if needed.
Implement Telegram photo fetching with caching and automatic refresh for expired references.
Create photo upload system with thumbnail generation optimization and metadata extraction.
Build responsive gallery with masonry layout lazy loading and lightbox viewer.
Implement photo tagging with auto-suggestions tag-based filtering and tag management.
Create intelligent cache system that refreshes Telegram file references before expiration.
